name: Justin Bieber
description: Beliebers' field guide — from Stratford Idol covers to Grammy wins.

questions.q: In what country was Justin Bieber born?

source.notes: Born March 1, 1994 in London, Ontario; raised in Stratford, Ontario.

questions.q: Which R&B singer mentored Justin Bieber and signed him to RBMG/Island in 2008?

source.notes: Bidding war with Justin Timberlake; Usher won.

questions.q: Who is Justin Bieber's longtime manager who discovered him on YouTube?
Which Ne-Yo song did 12-year-old Bieber famously cover at a 2007 Stratford Idol contest?

source.notes: Video uploaded to YouTube by his mother — Scooter Braun discovered him through it.

questions.q: What was Bieber's first #1 Billboard Hot 100 single (2015)?
What was the breakthrough 2010 single featuring Ludacris?

source.notes: From 'My World 2.0.' Music video has 3+ billion YouTube views.

questions.q: Which 2017 Latin remix did Bieber feature on, becoming a global #1?

source.notes: Remix with Luis Fonsi & Daddy Yankee. First mostly-Spanish #1 in 1996.

questions.q: Which 2015 album marked Bieber's comeback and included 'What Do You Mean?', 'Sorry', 'Love Yourself'?
What is the name of Justin Bieber's wife (married 2018)?

source.notes: Hailey Bieber (née Baldwin); daughter of Stephen Baldwin.

questions.q: What is the name of Bieber's first child, born August 2024?
Which 2011 documentary chronicled Bieber's rise from YouTube to Madison Square Garden?

source.notes: 'Justin Bieber: Never Say Never' grossed $99M worldwide.

questions.q: What is the name of Bieber's devoted fanbase?
Which 2010 single is Bieber's debut song?

source.notes: Released July 2009 from his debut EP 'My World.'

questions.q: Which on-and-off girlfriend (and Disney Channel star) did Bieber date 2010-2018?
Which DJ Snake collab with Bieber was a 2017 #1?
Which 2020 album debuted at #1 on Billboard 200, his record 7th?

source.notes: Made him the youngest male artist to ever score 7 #1 albums.

questions.q: Which 2021 album featured the hit 'Peaches' with Daniel Caesar and Giveon?

source.notes: 'Peaches' won Best Pop Solo Performance Grammy.

questions.q: Which condition did Bieber reveal in 2022 caused facial paralysis on one side?

source.notes: Caused him to postpone the Justice World Tour in 2022.

questions.q: What 2023 transaction made Bieber's music catalog reportedly the second-largest of any artist sold?

source.notes: Hipgnosis bought rights to his catalog for ~$200M in January 2023.

questions.q: Which 2024 fashion brand collab did Bieber launch — featuring oversized hoodies and sweats?

source.notes: Bieber announced he'd left Drew House (his prior brand) to start a new project. Drew House remains active under former co-founder Ryan Good.
